content.problemStatement:
Sarthak and Anuradha are very good friends and are eager to participate in an event called Equinox. It is a game of words. In this game, NNN strings S1,…,SNS_1,\ldots, S_NS1​,…,SN​ are given. For each string SiS_iSi​, if it starts with one of the letters of the word “EQUINOX”, Sarthak gets AAA points and if not, Anuradha gets BBB points. The one who has more points at the end of the game wins. If they both the same number of points, the game is a draw..

Print the winner of the game, if any, otherwise print “DRAW”.

###Input


The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains three integers NNN, AAA, BBB.
NNN lines follow, each containing a string SiS_{i}Si​.
All strings are in UPPERCASE.
###Output


For each test case, print “SARTHAK” (case insensitive) if he has more points than Anuradha, print “ANURADHA” (case insensitive) if she has more points than Sarthak, otherwise print “DRAW” (case insensitive), without the quotes.
###Constraints


1≤T≤1001 \leq T \leq 1001≤T≤100
1≤N≤1001 \leq N \leq 1001≤N≤100
1≤A1 \leq A1≤A, B≤109B \leq 10^{9}B≤109
1≤∣Si∣≤1001 \leq \left|S_{i}\right| \leq 1001≤∣Si​∣≤100

sampleTestCases.input:
2
4 1 3
ABBBCDDE
EARTH
INDIA
UUUFFFDDD
2 5 7
SDHHD
XOXOXOXO
sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The strings which start with one of the letters of the word EQUINOX are {\{{ EARTH, INDIA, UUUFFFDDD }\}}. Thus, Sarthak gets 111 point for each of these strings. In total, Sarthak gets 333 points.
On the other hand, there is one string that does not start with one of the letters of the word EQUINOX. Thus, Anuradha gets 333 points for that string.
Finally, since both of them have equal points, the game results in DRAW.
Test case 222: There is only one string that starts with one of the letters of the word EQUINOX which is XOXOXOXO. Thus, Sarthak gets 555 point for this string.
There is one string that does not start with one of the letters of the word EQUINOX. Thus, Anuradha gets 777 points for that string.
Finally, Anuradha has the higher score. So she is the winner.

hidden.input:
2
4 1 3
ABBBCDDE
EARTH
INDIA
UUUFFFDDD
2 5 7
SDHHD
XOXOXOXO
